sourceAmbiguity: Preference review copy could imply contact details are synchronized across authorities.
decisionTaken: Added explicit copy that Vecells preference edits affect Vecells communication behavior only.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The contact-route snapshot and external identity/demographic authorities are separate contracts.
operationalRisk: Localized or shortened copy may omit the side-effect boundary.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Validator should continue checking side-effect copy in route, atlas, and contract.
